deferrals.summary: The §2 canonical exclusion-list block omits .devflow/config.schema.json, which lib/check-excluded-path.sh does match — a pre-existing doc/code drift in the prose copy. (This PR points condition (ii) at the authoritative matcher instead, so it does not rely on the stale list.)
deferrals.explanation: Pre-existing: the canonical list block was last edited 2026-05-22 (commit 5d94ff5), before this PR; AC 7 explicitly forbids altering the §2 list (byte-for-byte-in-sync invariant). Reconciling the list belongs in a separate change.
